title_en: 66. What is established from Maimoonah (radhiAllaahu'anhaa) who described the
content_en: Prophet's (sallallaahu 'alaihi wa sallam) ghusl from Janaabah and said: Then I brought him a cloth but he refused it. [Al-Bukhaaree, and Muslim - and the word is his]. The Final word: Is that drying the body-parts is one of the desirable actions as shown by the hadith of Aa'ishah (radhiAllaahu 'anhaa) - as for the saying that it is makrooh then that is not acceptable as the saying of Maimoonah (radhiAllaahu 'anhaa) "but he refused it" does not amount to the fact that it is makrooh - and Allaah Knows best. THOSE THINGS WHICH BREAK WUDOO (1) THAT WHICH COMES OUT FROM THE TWO PRIVATE PARTS (FRONT AND BACK): info@calgaryislam.com www.calgaryislam.com Abu Hurairah (radhiAllaahu 'anhu) said: Rasoolullah (sallallaahu 'alaihi wa sallam) said Allaah does not accept the prayer of any one of you having committed hadath until he makes wudoo. [Al-Bukhaaree (al Fath, 1/206) and Muslim (no.245)].
title_id: Hadis 66: Maimunah dan Kesimpulan tentang Mengeringkan Anggota; Pembatal Wudu
content_id: Apa yang ditetapkan dari Maimunah (radhiyallahu anha) yang menggambarkan mandi janabah Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: Kemudian aku membawa kain kepada beliau, tetapi beliau menolaknya. [Al-Bukhari dan Muslim, lafaz dari Muslim]. Kesimpulan: Mengeringkan anggota tubuh adalah salah satu amalan yang dianjurkan sebagaimana ditunjukkan oleh hadis Aisyah (radhiyallahu anha). Adapun pendapat bahwa hal itu makruh, maka tidak dapat diterima, karena ucapan Maimunah (radhiyallahu anha) "tetapi beliau menolaknya" tidak berarti bahwa hal itu makruh. HAL-HAL YANG MEMBATALKAN WUDU. (1) YANG KELUAR DARI DUA JALAN (DEPAN DAN BELAKANG). Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu anhu) berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Allah tidak menerima salat seorang pun di antara kalian yang berbuat hadats hingga ia berwudu. [Al-Bukhari (al-Fath, 1/206) dan Muslim (no. 245)].
